model_specification_line: smf.ols('employed_ft_dm ~ post_dm + treated_dm + post_treated_dm', data=df).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: non-citizen (proxy for lacking lawful status): citizen == 3
survey years 2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016 (2012 excluded as DACA transition year)
birth year 1972-1997: defines treated cohort (birthyr >= 1982, age < 31 at June 2012) and control cohort (birthyr 1972-1981, age 31-40 at June 2012)
immigrated to the US (yrimmig > 0) by 2007 or earlier (yrimmig <= 2007, proxy for continuous residence since June 15 2007)
arrived before age 16: (yrimmig - birthyr) >= 0 and < 16 (key DACA arrival-age criterion)
at least 18 years old at survey time: age >= 18
treatment_definition: (birthyr >= 1982).astype(float)  # age < 31 as of June 15 2012 — DACA-eligible age cohort
